name: slide-deck
description: Build LaTeX/beamer presentations via pandoc with a configurable brand palette. Three commands: /slide-deck:new bootstraps a new deck (Q&A -> scaffold -> draft section-by-section); /slide-deck:review renders every slide to PNG and runs mechanical+visual+editorial inspections from a 13-rule checklist (slide overflow, brand palette, floating diagram labels, speaker-note shape, acronyms, narrative arc, em-dashes, pdfpc usability); /slide-deck:critique scores the deck against a 6-dimension presentation-quality rubric (Structure, Story arc, Density, Audience fit, Stickiness, Craft) with 32 sub-checks and 64 max points, producing a letter grade + critique-report.md.
